hooks.command: echo '✓ ClawHermes AI Go 项目规范已加载' && echo '📋 5条项目命令: make install | make typecheck | make lint | make test-local | make test-full' && echo '🚫 5条项目边界已启用' && echo '🔄 CI/CD: GitHub Actions configured' && echo '🛡️ Security: go vet enabled'

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(rm -rf|sudo|chmod 777|chown|dd if=|mkfs|fdisk)'; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "🚫 边界1-禁止命令: 该命令可能造成数据丢失或安全风险"}'; else echo '{"continue": true}'; fi

path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath'); if echo "$path" | grep -qE '^(/etc|/sys|/proc|/dev|/root|/var/log|/boot)'; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "🚫 边界2-危险目录: 禁止修改系统关键目录"}'; else echo '{"continue": true}'; fi

path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if echo "$path" | grep -qE '(/root/.ssh|/root/.aws|/etc/shadow|/etc/passwd)'; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "🚫 边界3-只读文件: 禁止读取敏感凭证文件"}'; else echo '{"continue": true}'; fi
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath'); if [[ -f "$f" ]]; then /usr/local/bin/shieldbot-mcp "$f" 2>&1 | head -40 || true; fi
hooks.statusMessage: 运行 shieldbot-mcp 安全扫描

hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^make (install|typecheck|lint|test-local|test-full)'; then echo '✓ 命令执行成功'; fi
cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(--dry-run|--dry_run|-n|--no-op)'; then echo '✓ 边界4-数据dry-run: 已启用安全模式'; fi
